title: 10 best herbal essential oils for ulcerative colitis
description: Geranium essential oils helps with ulcerative colitis because of its remarkable anti-inflammatory properties. The oil's ability to soothe and calm irritated tissues in the colon can provide relief from symptoms such as abdominal pain, diarrhea, and rectal bleeding. Additionally, geranium oil has been shown to inhibit the growth of harmful bacteria and yeast that may contribute to the development of ulcerative colitis.
